payload.answer: Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the newer current memory; mem_old was filtered as superseded.
payload.decision: recall returned mem_new and filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by a newer, more current memory about the same entity/context.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall query matched the current entity state, and the older memory was excluded because it had been superseded.

payload.intent: Explain the recall result for Sam from Goldman, including why the newer memory was selected and the older one was filtered out.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman is represented by mem_new in recall because it is the current memory for that entity/context.
mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as the current fact.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.
Retire mem_old from active recall so it is not surfaced as current.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain the recall result for Sam from Goldman, including why the newer memory was selected and the older one was filtered out.","decision":"recall returned mem_new and filtered mem_old because mem_old is superseded by a newer, more current memory about the same entity/context.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_fact","statement":"Sam from Goldman is represented by mem_new in recall because it is the current memory for that entity/context.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"represents","object":"Sam from Goldman"}]},{"kind":"superseded_fact","statement":"mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be treated as the current fact.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"mem_old","type":"memory","role":"older_memory"},{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolved_to_existing_entity","entity_id":"Sam from Goldman","reason":"The recall query matched the current entity state, and the older memory was excluded because it had been superseded."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall selected mem_new for Sam from Goldman because it is the newer current memory; mem_old was filtered as superseded.","citations":["fixture:debug_explain_recall_sam__context"],"repair_options":["Keep mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.","Retire mem_old from active recall so it is not surfaced as current."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["mem_new returned","mem_old filtered as superseded"]}}
